india_trends.title: Cisco stock price surges 20% after AI-led order boom; up to 4,000 layoffs planned
india_trends.summary: Shares of the California-based firm rose 19.76% in extended trading to $122. The stock has risen 34% in 2026 so far, as demand for AI-related stocks remains high in the global markets.

india_trends.title: EAM Jaishankar welcomes Russian FM Sergey Lavrov at BRICS Foreign Ministers' meeting
india_trends.summary: New Delhi hosted the BRICS Foreign Ministers' meeting. External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar welcomed delegates from member and observer nations. The meeting is part of India's 2026 BRICS chairship. Discussions covered global and regional issues. India assumed the BRICS Chairmanship on January 1.

india_trends.title: Vedanta demerger: Do you have the unlisted shares in your demat account? Here’s all you need to know
india_trends.summary: Vedanta's recent demerger has resulted in four new unlisted companies added to shareholders' demat accounts. These entities are expected to list and commence trading on BSE and NSE by mid-June, following regulatory approvals. Investors are now awaiting the market debut of these spun-off businesses.

india_trends.title: Global Market: Japanese investors turn net sellers of foreign stocks after four months
india_trends.summary: Japanese investors became net sellers of foreign equities in April for the first time in four months, offloading 636.4 billion yen due to rising energy costs and inflation fears. india_trends.title: This small-cap chemical stock rallies 20% after strong Q4 results. Do you own?
india_trends.summary: Small-cap chemical stock Balaji Amines opened at ₹1,496 apiece today, as compared to the previous close of ₹1,352 on Wednesday, following a stellar March quarter show. The stock has risen 46% on a YTD basis, defying the market slump.

india_trends.title: Honda books first annual loss, hit by $9 billion EV charge
india_trends.summary: Honda Motor reported its first annual loss in almost 70 years, totaling 414.3 billion yen, due to U.S. tariffs and significant restructuring costs for its electric vehicle business.
